notes: Original generated image was preserved in the Codex generated_images cache and copied into the experiment reference folder.
Canonical was resized to 2048x2048 for the Live2D material pipeline.
The image is suitable for part purity testing because eyes, ears, hair, fur shoulder, choker, and clothing boundaries are visible.
Hair crosses near eye/lash areas, so eye/lash purity is expected to require cleanup/regeneration.
